ListEipTransfer.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, default 10.
ListEipTransfer.direction: sent: initiated by me, received: received by me.
ListEipTransfer.transferId: Exact query by transfer ID, multiple IDs supported separated by underscore.
ListEipTransfer.status: Transfer status, default is all. (processing, transfering, cancel, reject, timeout, failed, success)
